title: Shiv Chalisa
intro: A devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Shiva, recited for peace, strength and well-being.
description:
|| Shri Shiv Chalisa ||
(The full verses of the Shiv Chalisa will be added here.)
meaning: This Chalisa describes the glory, compassion and grace of Lord Shiva.

faq.q1: When should I recite Shiv Chalisa?
faq.a1: Mondays and Pradosh days are considered especially auspicious.
faq.q2: Can it be recited in any language?
faq.a2: Yes, devotion matters more than language.
